verses.text: Judah' tapate: Perez, Hezron, Karmi, Hur, leh Shobal ahi uh hi
Shobal' tapa Reaiah pen Jahath' pa hi a, Jahath pen Ahumai leh Lahad' pa ahi hi. Hihte pen Zorah khua-ah a teng minamte' pu leh pate ahi uh hi

Hur pen a pa Kaleb' zi Efrath' ta upa pen hi a, ama suanlekhakte in Bethlehem khuapi sat uh hi. Hur' tapa thumte: Etam, Penuel, leh Ezer ahi uh hi. Etam in tapa thum nei a, tuate pen Jezreel, Ishma, leh Idbash ahi uh hi. Tanu khat zong nei a, a min Hazzeleponi ahi hi. Penuel pen Gedor khuapi a satpa hi a, Ezer pen Hushah khuapi a satpa ahi hi
Tekoa khuapi a sat Ashhur in zi nih, Helah leh Naarah nei hi
Naarah in amah tawh Ahuzzam, Hefer, Temeni, leh Haahashtari nei hi. Hihte pen Naarah' tapate ahi uh hi
Helah tawh a tapate: Zereth, Izhar leh Ethnan ahi uh hi
Koz pen Anub leh Zobebah' pa hi a, Harum' tapa Aharhel' suante' pupi ahi hi
Jabez a kici mi khat a sanggamte sangin pahtawihuai zaw hi. A nu in, “Gimpi-in amah nei ka hih manin,” ci-in a min Jabez a phuak hi

Jabez in Israel Pasian tungah thu ngen a, “Kei thupha hong pia-in ka gamgi hong keeksak in. Kei hong ompih in la, siatna khatpeuh in kei hong gimsak lohna dingin hong kem in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Pasian in ama ngetna pia hi
Shuhah' sanggampa Khelub pen Mehir' pa hi a, Mehir pen Eshton' pa ahi hi
Eshton in Bethrafa, Paseah, leh Tehinnah, tapa thum nei a, Tehinnah pen Irnahash khuapi a satpa ahi hi. Hih mite' suanlekhakte, Rekah munah teng uh hi
Kenaz' tapate: Othniel leh Seraiah ahi uh hi. Othniel' tapate: Hathath leh Meonothai ahi uh hi
Meonothai pen Ofrah' pa ahi hi. Seraiah pen Joab' pa hi a, Joab pen Geharashim khuapi a satpa ahi hi. Tua khua-a teng mite khutsiamte vive ahih manin tua min a kiphuak ahi hi
Jefunneh' tapa Kaleb' tapate: Iru, Elah, leh Naam ahi uh hi. Elah' tapa Kenaz ahi hi
Jehallelel' tapate: Zif, Zifah, Tiria, leh Asarel ahi uh hi

Ezrah' tapa lite: Jether, Mered, Efer, leh Jalon ahi uh hi. Mered in Faro' tanu Bithiah ten'pih a, tanu Miriam leh tapa Shammai leh Ishbah nei hi. Ishbah pen Eshtemoa khuapi a satpa ahi hi. Mered in Judah minam numei khat zong ten'pih a, tua tawh tapa thum nei hi. Tuate in: Gedor khuapi a satpa Jered, Soko khuapi a satpa Heber, leh Zanoah khuapi a satpa Jekuthiel ahi hi
Hodiah in Naham' sanggamnu ten'pih a, amau' suante pen Keilah khua-ah a teng Garm mite leh Eshtemoa khua-ah a teng Maakath minamte ahi uh hi
Shimon' tapate: Amnon, Rinnah, Benhanan, leh Tilon ahi uh hi. Ishi' tapate: Zoheth leh Benzoheth ahi uh hi
Judah' tapa khat ahi Shelah' tapate: Lekah khuapi a sat Er, leh Mareshah khuapi a sat Laadah hi a, Bethashbea khua-ah saihadial puan a gan minamte ahi hi

Tua ciangin Jokim leh Kozeba khuapi sungah a teng mite hi a, tua ciangin Joash leh Saraf zong ahi uh hi. Amaute gel in Moab numeite ten'pihin Bethlehem khua-ah teng uh hi. (Hih pen tuanthu lui pekpek thu ahi hi
Hihte pen beelsekte hi a, Netaim khua leh Gederah khua-ah a tengte ahi uh hi. Ama na a sem dingin kumpipa tawh tua khuate-ah tengkhawm uh hi.
Simeon' tapate: Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Zerah, leh Shaul ahi uh hi
Shaul' tapa Shallum, a tapa Mibsam, a tapa Mishma ahi uh hi
Mishma' suante: A tapa Hammuel, a tapa Zakkur, a tapa Shimei ahi uh hi
Shimei in tapa sawmleguk leh tanu guk nei hi. Ahih hangin a sanggamte in ta tampi neilo uh a, Judah minamte a pun' bangin Simeon minamte punglo uh hi
Amaute Beersheba, Moladah, Hazarshual
Bihah, Ezem, Tolad
Bethuel, Hormah, Ziklag
Beth Markaboth, Hazarsusim, Bethbiri, leh Shaaraim-ah teng uh hi. Hihte pen David' uk hun mateng amaute' khuapite ahi hi
Tua ciangin amau' khuate Etam, Ain, Rimmon, Tokhen, leh Ashan, khuapi nga
Baal ciangdong hih khuapite kiima om a khuaneute khempeuh tawh ahi hi. Hihte pen amau' ten'na hi a, amaute in khangsimna ciamtehna nei uh hi
Tua ciangin Meshobab, Jamlek, Amaziah' tapa Joshah
Joel, Asiel' tapa Seraiah, a tapa Joshibiah, a tapa Jehu
Elioenai, Jaakobah, Jeshohaiah, Asaiah, Adiel, Jesimiel, Benaiah
Shemaiah' tapa Shimri, a tapa Jedaiah, a tapa Allon, a tapa Shifi' tapa Ziza hi uh a
a minin a kilo hih mite pen amau' beh ciatah ulian hi uh a, amau' beh ciat nakpi takin a khang hi
A tuuhonte uh-a' dingin lonona a zong dingin kuam nisuahna lampang, Gedor lutna lamah khualzin uh a
lei hoih, lonona, leh gam zai-in, gam dai-in, a nopna mun mu uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh tua lai-ah a teng masate pen Ham mite ahi uh hi

A minin a kiciamteh hih mite, Judah kumpi Hezekiah' hun sungin hong pai uh a, tua lai-ah a om Meunim mite leh amau' puanbukte susia-in tuni dongin amaute beisak uh a, amau' tuuhonte-a' dingin tua lai-ah lonona om ahih manin amau' munah amaute a teng uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute pawlkhat, Simeon mi za nga, Seir Mual-ah pai uh a, amaute in Ishi' tapate Pelatiah, Neariah, Refaiah, leh Uzziel makai-in a nei uh hi
Amaute in Amalek mi a suakta a omlaite susia uh a, tuni dongin tua munah amaute teng uh hi.
